what_it_does: Stores ledger metadata for a PNG icon asset named 'image (25)' in the design-assets channel, referencing a B2 blob, with zero declared dimensions and empty alt text.
observations: This file is a YAML-frontmatter ledger record with no prose body.
The asset is a PNG image in the design-assets/icons channel with id 'icons/image (25)'.
Width and height are recorded as 0.
The image alt text is empty in version 1.
Source is 'dragnet' and author session is 'ch-3mpkjg3r'.
Created and updated timestamps are identical.
standouts: Zero width and height for an image asset.
Empty alt text on a design asset.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a fixed schema for channel-memory ledger entries.
References binary content via a blob:// URI.
Includes versioning block with per-version metadata.
Uses ISO 8601 timestamps with timezone offset.
concerns: Recorded dimensions 0x0 may indicate incomplete metadata or a failed ingestion.
Empty alt text reduces accessibility and searchability.
No links means the asset is not yet wired into any document or component.
notes: A bare ledger stub for a design-assets PNG icon that has been ingested but not yet described or connected.
questions: Why are the width and height zero?
Is the empty alt text intentional or pending?
What does 'dragnet' signify as a source?
purpose_vs_actual: The file appears intended to catalog a design asset; it does catalog the asset but lacks descriptive geometry and alt text, so it is only partially fulfilling a useful asset ledger role.
intention_signals: Record the existence and provenance of a PNG icon in the design-assets channel so it can be referenced by address and versioned over time.
contribution: Provides a stable, addressable ledger entry and blob reference for a design-assets icon, enabling future linking, versioning, and retrieval even though descriptive metadata is currently minimal.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata record for a zero-dimension PNG icon named 'image (25)' in the design-assets/icons channel, stored as a B2 blob with empty alt text and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To register a design-assets icon image in the channel-memory ledger for later reference and versioning.
